message:
Merge PR #2241: feat: add --agent override to gt formula run (GH#2118)

Adds CLI --agent flag and per-leg/formula-level agent fields for convoy formulas,
enabling non-Claude runtimes (gemini, codex, etc.) with clear three-level precedence:
per-leg > CLI flag > formula default. Conflict with Pour field resolved (kept both).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2241
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+package cmd
+
+import "testing"
+
+func TestResolveFormulaLegAgent_Precedence(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	tests := []struct {
+		name         string
+		legAgent     string
+		cliAgent     string
+		formulaAgent string
+		want         string
+	}{
+		{"all empty", "", "", "", ""},
+		{"formula only", "", "", "gemini", "gemini"},
+		{"cli only", "", "codex", "", "codex"},
+		{"leg only", "claude-haiku", "", "", "claude-haiku"},
+		{"cli overrides formula", "", "codex", "gemini", "codex"},
+		{"leg overrides cli", "claude-haiku", "codex", "gemini", "claude-haiku"},
+		{"leg overrides formula", "claude-haiku", "", "gemini", "claude-haiku"},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
+			t.Parallel()
+			got := resolveFormulaLegAgent(tt.legAgent, tt.cliAgent, tt.formulaAgent)
+			if got != tt.want {
+				t.Errorf("resolveFormulaLegAgent(%q, %q, %q) = %q, want %q",
+					tt.legAgent, tt.cliAgent, tt.formulaAgent, got, tt.want)
+			}
+		})
+	}
+}
